extraction.one_line_summary: CHAMPOUZAN attacked from breakaway with 1.5km remaining on final climb, stealing stage from GC group led by ROGLIC who accelerated late.
tactical_patterns: INEOS used YATES as battering ram on category-one climb to soften field before BERNAL counter, revealing designated sacrifice tactics.
ROGLIC attacked personally after KROIWEIJK cracked, abandoning domestique support 30+ miles from finish on steep gradient.
CHAMPOUZAN stayed invisible mid-breakaway then attacked 1.5km out when GC riders neutralized each other watching for Roglic.
BERNAL feigned weakness on YATES attack then countered on shallower gradient where drafting negated advantage, showing gradient selection matters.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: attacked repeatedly on category-one despite struggling previous days, effectively weakened field for BERNAL before moving to podium
rider_signals.KROIWEIJK Steven: negative: cracked on category-one climb forcing ROGLIC to chase personally, three weeks work load finally showing
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: plummeted out of top-five despite YATES sacrifice tactic, unable to capitalize on manufactured opportunity
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: dropped to outside top-ten on penultimate stage despite being in contention at category-one base
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: positive: closed 23-second gap to CHAMPOUZAN in final kilometer, only 6 seconds short despite no teammates
